microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **enterprise recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills across partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform — defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a fully scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new model for continuous infrastructure validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract with strict reliability and uptime success criteria.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring proof-of-execution workflows to reduce planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — directly increasing field throughput without adding headcount.

Served as the trusted technical voice across staff engineers, data architects, and platform leads — translating complex distributed-systems failure scenarios into clear business-impact narratives for both executive and engineering audiences.

Surfaced field insights from 45+ enterprise resilience engagements to Product and Engineering, shaping platform roadmap priorities and closing gaps between customer-reported pain points and Artie's real-time replication capabilities.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-driven code generation adoption** across Azure, running structured demos and technical training sessions that drove consistent utilization across 14 key engineering teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating field findings into actionable engineering requirements.

Accelerated technical knowledge retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting average lookup time by 83% and improving data integrity across engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, enabling 140+ teams to launch Azure regions 28% faster with fewer integration blockers.

Drove discovery across 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a phased automation roadmap targeting the highest-impact pipeline and infrastructure workflows across the data stack.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-value support investments, and measure progress against reduction targets quarter-over-quarter.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the transition strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating handoffs across infrastructure and engineering teams.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain velocity through a complex legacy-to-modern platform cutover.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release toil across the robotics fleet.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that improved pipeline visibility and reduced proposal turnaround time.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to improve qualified lead volume.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering a data-driven framework to guide future job scoping and resource allocation.
